title: Airport Authority Votes To Terminate Airport Operator’s Lease (Updated) – The Fairhope Times
description: Updated to add councilman Burrell's comments. January 11, 2022 Airport Authority meeting. HANGAR TENANTS BEING EVICTED BY COMPANY At the end of its January meeting yesterday, the city's Airport Authority voted unanimously to approve a resolution to terminate its long-time contract with airport operator Contintenal Motors, unless the company rescinded its surprise decision the day…
